title: ClipBook
architecture: Remotion + Google Cloud Vision + Gemini API + Cloudflare R2
dataset: Physical instruction manuals via OCR pipeline
description: AI document ingestion pipeline that extracts text from physical manuals using Google Cloud Vision OCR and Gemini, then renders automated MP4 tutorial videos via Remotion and a TypeScript monorepo.

title: Brain Invaders
performance: 20% reduction in impulsive inputs across test players
description: Cognitive training game tracking 5+ behavioral metrics per session — reaction time, error rate, decision latency — via Flask APIs with adaptive difficulty and real-time Chart.js dashboards.

title: TLC Taxi Fare Predictor
dataset: 700,000+ NYC taxi records from 3 external APIs
performance: R² = 0.92 on holdout, +18% vs linear baseline
description: End-to-end ML pipeline ingesting, cleaning, and merging 700K+ records from 3 external APIs. Gradient Boosting model on 6 hand-engineered features achieving R² of 0.92.

title: Notes University
performance: 10+ features shipped; JWT auth, bcrypt, REST APIs
description: Full-stack note-sharing platform for students across 50+ universities. JWT authentication, bcrypt hashing, custom RESTful APIs, and dynamic filtering across a React + Node.js + MongoDB stack.
